# The Iliad

*Homer · 750 BCE · *Ἰλιάς**

Greek epic attributed to Homer, in twenty-four books, covering a few weeks of the final year of the Trojan War. Centered on the wrath of Achilles, it is the great poem of war, of heroic honor and of force, where [Odysseus](../characters/odysseus.md) already stands out for his eloquence and cunning.
